summary: Verified hero bio visibility fix. The bio paragraph is now visible on page load with correct text, height=102px, opacity=1, and all word spans settled to transform=none (animation completed).
critical_code_review_comments: RevealText renders words joined with non-breaking spaces (\u00a0) instead of regular spaces. Text is human-readable and visually identical, but automated string comparisons using regular spaces will fail. Consider whether this is intentional (prevents word wrap breaks) or should use regular spaces for accessibility/SEO/copy-paste.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero bio fix verified. data-testid='hero-bio' present, visible, opacity=1, height>0, spans transform=none. Text matches when \xa0 is normalized to space.
rca of the issue: Previous whileInView trigger did not fire on initial load because hero was already in-viewport before framer-motion attached observers (or IntersectionObserver missed initial intersection). Switching to animate=... auto-plays on mount, guaranteeing the words slide in immediately. Verified working.
